---
title: "Welcome"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: article
---

<div class="cover-hero">
<div class="cover-hero-text">
<p class="cover-eyebrow">A practical book for data scientists</p>
<h1>From Data to Impact</h1>
<p>A structured, project-based path from Python fundamentals to production-ready data science and MLOps, built to be run and not just read.</p>
<p class="cover-author">By <a href="https://sambaiga.github.io/" style="color:#38BDF8;font-weight:600">Anthony Faustine</a>&nbsp;&nbsp;<a href="https://github.com/sambaiga" title="GitHub" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-github"></i></a>&nbsp;<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sambaiga" title="LinkedIn" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>&nbsp;<a href="mailto:sambaiga@gmail.com" title="Email" style="color:#94A3B8"><i class="bi bi-envelope-at"></i></a></p>

<div class="cover-stat-row">
<div class="cover-stat">
  <span class="stat-value">10</span>
  <span class="stat-label">Parts</span>
</div>
<div class="cover-stat">
  <span class="stat-value">20+</span>
  <span class="stat-label">Chapters</span>
</div>
<div class="cover-stat">
  <span class="stat-value">4</span>
  <span class="stat-label">Parts complete</span>
</div>
</div>

<a href="tutorials/01-python-basics/01-python-core.ipynb" class="btn-cover btn-primary-cover"><i class="bi bi-play-fill"></i> Start learning</a>
<a href="preface.qmd" class="btn-cover btn-secondary-cover"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> Read the preface</a>
</div>

<div class="cover-hero-visual" aria-hidden="true">
<svg viewBox="0 0 400 260" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="cv-arrow" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" refX="3.5" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 7 3.5, 0 7" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.65"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Left: scattered input data points -->
  <circle cx="22" cy="38"  r="3.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.55"/>
  <circle cx="48" cy="22"  r="2.5" fill="#7C3AED" opacity="0.45"/>
  <circle cx="68" cy="50"  r="4"   fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.35"/>
  <circle cx="15" cy="75"  r="2.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.6"/>
  <circle cx="55" cy="85"  r="3"   fill="#7C3AED" opacity="0.4"/>
  <circle cx="30" cy="112" r="4"   fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.5"/>
  <circle cx="75" cy="105" r="2"   fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="10" cy="142" r="3"   fill="#7C3AED" opacity="0.4"/>
  <circle cx="60" cy="140" r="3.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.45"/>
  <circle cx="35" cy="172" r="2.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.55"/>
  <circle cx="72" cy="168" r="3"   fill="#7C3AED" opacity="0.35"/>
  <circle cx="20" cy="200" r="4"   fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.4"/>
  <circle cx="55" cy="210" r="2.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.5"/>
  <circle cx="78" cy="230" r="3"   fill="#7C3AED" opacity="0.35"/>

  <!-- Faint edges between nearby dots -->
  <line x1="22" y1="38"  x2="48" y2="22"   stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.18"/>
  <line x1="22" y1="38"  x2="15" y2="75"   stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.15"/>
  <line x1="48" y1="22"  x2="68" y2="50"   stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.15"/>
  <line x1="55" y1="85"  x2="30" y2="112"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.18"/>
  <line x1="30" y1="112" x2="75" y2="105"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.14"/>
  <line x1="10" y1="142" x2="60" y2="140"  stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.14"/>
  <line x1="35" y1="172" x2="72" y2="168"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.14"/>
  <line x1="20" y1="200" x2="55" y2="210"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.18"/>

  <!-- Convergence: left cluster flows into neural net input layer -->
  <path d="M 80 38  C 108 38  112 55  130 55"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.28" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M 80 105 C 105 105 112 100 130 100" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.38" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M 80 155 C 105 155 112 155 130 155" stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.28" fill="none"/>
  <path d="M 80 210 C 108 210 112 205 130 205" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="1"   opacity="0.22" fill="none"/>

  <!-- Neural network: layer 1 (input, 4 nodes) -->
  <circle cx="148" cy="55"  r="7" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="1.5" fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.1" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="148" cy="100" r="7" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="1.5" fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.1" opacity="0.8"/>
  <circle cx="148" cy="155" r="7" stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="1.5" fill="#7C3AED" fill-opacity="0.1" opacity="0.7"/>
  <circle cx="148" cy="205" r="7" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="1.5" fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.1" opacity="0.7"/>

  <!-- L1 to L2 connections -->
  <line x1="155" y1="55"  x2="205" y2="80"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.18"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="55"  x2="205" y2="130" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.12"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="55"  x2="205" y2="178" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.08"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="100" x2="205" y2="80"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="100" x2="205" y2="130" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.24"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="100" x2="205" y2="178" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.12"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="155" x2="205" y2="80"  stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.12"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="155" x2="205" y2="130" stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.18"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="155" x2="205" y2="178" stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.2"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="205" x2="205" y2="80"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.08"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="205" x2="205" y2="130" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.12"/>
  <line x1="155" y1="205" x2="205" y2="178" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.18"/>

  <!-- Neural network: layer 2 (hidden, 3 nodes) -->
  <circle cx="212" cy="80"  r="8" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="2"   fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.16" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="212" cy="130" r="9" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="2.5" fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.22" opacity="1.0"/>
  <circle cx="212" cy="178" r="8" stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="2"   fill="#7C3AED" fill-opacity="0.14" opacity="0.85"/>

  <!-- L2 to L3 connections -->
  <line x1="220" y1="80"  x2="263" y2="108" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.24"/>
  <line x1="220" y1="80"  x2="263" y2="158" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.12"/>
  <line x1="220" y1="130" x2="263" y2="108" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.3"/>
  <line x1="220" y1="130" x2="263" y2="158" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.24"/>
  <line x1="220" y1="178" x2="263" y2="108" stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.14"/>
  <line x1="220" y1="178" x2="263" y2="158" stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.2"/>

  <!-- Neural network: layer 3 (output, 2 nodes) -->
  <circle cx="270" cy="108" r="9.5" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="2.5" fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.28" opacity="1.0"/>
  <circle cx="270" cy="158" r="8"   stroke="#7C3AED" stroke-width="2"   fill="#7C3AED" fill-opacity="0.2"  opacity="0.9"/>

  <!-- Output arrow to chart -->
  <path d="M 280 133 L 306 133" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.45" fill="none" marker-end="url(#cv-arrow)"/>

  <!-- Right: rising impact chart -->
  <!-- Axes -->
  <line x1="316" y1="228" x2="316" y2="44" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.75" opacity="0.22"/>
  <line x1="316" y1="228" x2="396" y2="228" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.75" opacity="0.22"/>

  <!-- Subtle horizontal grid lines -->
  <line x1="316" y1="192" x2="396" y2="192" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.09"/>
  <line x1="316" y1="155" x2="396" y2="155" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.09"/>
  <line x1="316" y1="118" x2="396" y2="118" stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.09"/>
  <line x1="316" y1="80"  x2="396" y2="80"  stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.09"/>

  <!-- Area under rising trend -->
  <path d="M 323 218 L 337 198 L 350 182 L 362 158 L 373 124 L 383 90 L 391 62 L 391 228 L 323 228 Z"
        fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.07"/>

  <!-- Rising trend line -->
  <path d="M 323 218 L 337 198 L 350 182 L 362 158 L 373 124 L 383 90 L 391 62"
        stroke="#38BDF8" stroke-width="2.5" opacity="0.88" fill="none"
        stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>

  <!-- Data point dots on trend -->
  <circle cx="323" cy="218" r="2.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.48"/>
  <circle cx="337" cy="198" r="2.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.58"/>
  <circle cx="350" cy="182" r="2.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.65"/>
  <circle cx="362" cy="158" r="3"   fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.75"/>
  <circle cx="373" cy="124" r="3"   fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.84"/>
  <circle cx="383" cy="90"  r="3.5" fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.9"/>

  <!-- Peak impact dot with halo -->
  <circle cx="391" cy="62" r="11" fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.08"/>
  <circle cx="391" cy="62" r="7"  fill="#38BDF8" fill-opacity="0.18"/>
  <circle cx="391" cy="62" r="4"  fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.95"/>

  <!-- IMPACT label at peak -->
  <text x="391" y="50" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif"
        font-size="7.5" font-weight="700" letter-spacing="0.07em"
        fill="#38BDF8" opacity="0.78">IMPACT</text>

  <!-- Section labels at bottom -->
  <text x="45"  y="252" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif"
        font-size="7" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="0.06em"
        fill="#94A3B8" opacity="0.55">DATA</text>
  <text x="210" y="252" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif"
        font-size="7" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="0.06em"
        fill="#94A3B8" opacity="0.55">MODEL</text>
  <text x="356" y="252" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="'Jost', system-ui, sans-serif"
        font-size="7" font-weight="600" letter-spacing="0.06em"
        fill="#94A3B8" opacity="0.55">OUTPUT</text>
</svg>
</div>
</div>

::: {.callout-note icon=false #callout-guide}
## How this book works

Every chapter is a Jupyter notebook or QMD file meant to be **run top to bottom**, not just read. Along the way you will see four recurring markers:

| Marker | Purpose |
|--------|---------|
| <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill" style="color:#0369A1"></i> **Key Concept** | The core idea, precisely defined |
| <i class="bi bi-puzzle-fill" style="color:#009E73"></i> **Activity** | Hands-on challenge: fill in the `...` yourself before moving on |
| <i class="bi bi-bug-fill" style="color:#DC2626"></i> **Common Mistake** | A bug pattern worth recognising on sight |
| <i class="bi bi-lightbulb-fill" style="color:#7C3AED"></i> **Pro Tip** | A production-grade habit |
:::

<p class="section-label">Your learning path</p>

:::: {.grid .roadmap-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-1"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-layers act-icon act-icon-1"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Act 1 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Build the Foundation</span>
<p class="act-desc">Language, data wrangling, and engineering practices</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
  <li><a href="tutorials/01-python-basics/01-python-core.ipynb"><span class="ch-num">01</span><span class="ch-name">Foundations</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
  <li><a href="tutorials/01-python-basics/08-pandas-core.ipynb"><span class="ch-num">02</span><span class="ch-name">Data Analysis</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
  <li><a href="tutorials/02-dev-tools/00-vscode-setup.qmd"><span class="ch-num">03</span><span class="ch-name">Dev Tools</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-2"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-robot act-icon act-icon-2"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Act 2 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Master the Models</span>
<p class="act-desc">Classical ML, deep learning, and large language models</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
  <li><a href="tutorials/04-ml-intro/01-ml-introduction.html"><span class="ch-num">04</span><span class="ch-name">Classical ML</span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill ch-check"></i></a></li>
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">05</span><span class="ch-name">Deep Learning</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">06</span><span class="ch-name">LLMs</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-3"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff act-icon act-icon-3"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Act 3 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ship to Production</span>
<p class="act-desc">MLOps pipelines, CI/CD, and production monitoring</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">07</span><span class="ch-name">MLOps</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">08</span><span class="ch-name">Production Monitoring</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<div class="act-card">
<div class="act-stripe act-4"></div>
<div class="act-inner">
<i class="bi bi-bullseye act-icon act-icon-4"></i>
<span class="act-eyebrow">Act 4 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Design for Impact</span>
<p class="act-desc">Scalable ML systems and value-driven AI</p>
<ul class="act-chapters">
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">09</span><span class="ch-name">ML System Design</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
  <li><span class="ch-row"><span class="ch-num">10</span><span class="ch-name">Value-driven AI</span><span class="ch-soon">soon</span></span></li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
:::

::::

<p style="margin-top:28px;color:#94A3B8;font-size:0.8rem;">Parts are released chapter by chapter as each reaches the same standard as Acts 1–3. &nbsp;<a href="https://github.com/sambaiga/ds-mlops-path" style="color:#64748B">View source on GitHub</a></p>
